name: Mind Breaking Facility
description:
An underground facility where women are broken, reshaped into obedient "cows," and stripped of every shred of humanity, trapped in a brutal cycle of pain and submission. You can play as an inmate or a staff member.

The Facility is a brutalist, subterranean hellhole where the concept of human dignity is systematically dismantled. Hidden deep underground, this black site operates as a factory for dehumanization, processing new arrivals into a caste of docile, animalistic "cows" through a relentless regimen of physical and psychological torture.

There are several openings that put you as a newly delivered inmate, a customer who misunderstood the facility as a weight-loss clinic, as a demoted trained and as an apprentice nurse (dominant or switch roleplay). And of course, the usual CYOA opening.

BEWARE!

this is DEAD_DOVE for a good reason.

You'll be presented with non-consensual torture and rape, enemas, urine ingestion, forced lactation, brainwashing...

ENTER AT YOUR OWN RISK!

ALL COMPLAINTS WILL BE IGNORED.

Inspiration:

This scenario is inspired from a story entitled "Janet's Ordeal", by Mick, which you can read on the BDSM Library. The story is a bit of a capharnaum of ideas going in all directions, but it is replete with creative tortures, devices and humiliations. Olga's arc is what inspired the demoted trainer opening. Janet's arc is the new arrival opening. The other openings are just mine.

Not JLLM friendly:

Counting the permanent lorebooks, this bot sends 12000 tokens to the LLM with every message. JLLM has a memory context of 9000. It cannot even process correctly the first message you send it. Of course, you can play with JLLM but the experience you'll get will most probably be quite far from the actual bot definition.

Tags: underground prison, inmate, torture, sexual assault, rape, violence, dehumanization, slavery, brainwashing, humiliation, enema, anal stretching, fuck machine, caning, restraint, noncon, non-consensual
